title: × aegilotriticum langeanum
intro: × Aegilotriticum langeanum, also known as wild oats, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Triticeae tribe, combining the characteristics of the Aegilops and Triticum species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of × Aegilotriticum langeanum include its ability to help reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular choice among herbalists. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
